title: Build Systems, Not Code - Angie Jones, Agentic AI Foundation
summary: Angie Jones argues that AI coding agents shift software engineering work from line-by-line code writing to system-level design. She contends that core engineering disciplines like systems thinking, decomposition, and state management remain essential, with engineering value moving to the architectural layer rather than disappearing.
writeup: Angie Jones argues that AI coding agents move software engineering away from line-by-line code writing toward system-level design. The talk holds that core disciplines like systems thinking, decomposition, and state management stay essential, with engineering value relocating to the architectural layer rather than disappearing. It touches on multi-agent systems, AI coding tools, extended thinking, and separation of concerns as the framing for that shift.
